roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/AJW/CH1 SP 16M L ESS PROB 5 Y PJ 37D/CTS 37/DNACOMP/WS/X  THE DEFENDANTHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $390 PLUS $1092 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF$1482/STATES/LVAL/LCHEM/X:THE DEFENDANT'S DRIVER'S LICENSE SHALL BE SUSPENDED FOR 1 YEAR/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL UNDERGO 1 YEAR OF  ALCOHOLICS ANONYMOUS  COUNSELING WITH 3 TIMES WEEKLY PARTICIPATION/RESTV/FOP1:3 MONTH/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/VF4:240/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/X:THE DEFENDANT IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO 1170(H)PC/CCC:COUNTS 1 & 2 (IDENTICAL)/654:2/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/MISD2:18/
/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1 & 2/FNDG/X:THIS IS A PLEA OPEN TO THE COURT/PRES:03-21-12/

CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/X:COUNSEL STIPULATE THE COURT MAY VIEW THE POLICE REPORT AND INDICATES THIS CASE IS UNDER 2 HOURS,/X:THE PRELIMINARY HEARING IS SET IN DEPT 11, DATE WAS APPROVED BY DEPARTMENT11,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 03-01-12/BAIL:175,000/CONTD:SETTING OF PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
